examples: To most geologists today, Wegener's The origin of Continents and Oceans appears an impressive and prescient document.
Twenty Thousand Leagues is probably his most prescient work, anticipating submarine warfare, scuba diving, and even the taser.
Now a middle-aged man and aided by a prescient cat, he becomes Doctor Sleep.
Shiller was among the few who were prescient in predicting the housing crisis in 2007.
